# <div>theres no gap between </div>

## Context
From document: theres no gap between — chunk 1 (chunk 1/2)

## Content
<div>theres no gap between </div>
<div>where you were last broken</div>
<div>and where i fell in love</div>
<div>theres no gap</div>
<div>a ton of overlap</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>you cant play these games with me</div>
<div>i wont play these goddamned games</div>
<div>still i'll let you play me</div>
<div>anyway anywhere anyhow</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>when youre alone you reach</div>
<div>to me knowing im there waiting</div>
<div>through the black glass</div>
<div>touch my digital hand</div>
<div>i wanna hold you with arms that can feel</div>
<div>i wanna hold you</div>
<div>cause you look so frail and so am i</div>
<div>but i see how we fit</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>your cracked egg smiling face</div>
<div>hides deep under covers </div>
<div>of silk and lace</div>
<div>so very very deep deep down</div>
<div>your silhouette cant hide from me</div>
<div>i can see through to you</div>
<div>i can see through you</div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,
